##project Overview
This project is a web application that allows users to manage their tasks and to-do lists. The application provides features such as creating, editing, and deleting tasks, as well as organizing tasks into different categories. The goal of the project is to help users stay organized and increase their productivity by providing an easy-to-use interface for managing their tasks. The application is built using modern web technologies, including React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend. The project is designed to be responsive and accessible, ensuring that users can access their tasks from any device. Overall, the project aims to provide a seamless and efficient task management experience for users.


##coding standards
To maintain a consistent codebase and ensure high-quality code, the following coding standards should be followed:  
1. Use meaningful variable and function names that accurately describe their purpose.
2. Follow a consistent indentation style (e.g., 2 spaces or 4 spaces)
3. Use camelCase for variable and function names, and PascalCase for class names.
4. Avoid using global variables and instead use local variables within functions or classes.
